customerId.title: customerId
customerId.description: Stores the UserId or ContactID of the User

customerType.title: customerType
customerType.description: Stores the Id type whether it is User or Contact

isVerified.title: isVerified
isVerified.description: Stores a boolean value that represents whether the codes passed into the flow match. Is available for output.

messageAfterVerification.title: messageAfterVerification
messageAfterVerification.description: Message displayed to the user after the verification process is complete.

messageAfterVerificationIfUser.title: messageAfterVerificationIfUser
messageAfterVerificationIfUser.description: Message displayed to the end user if verification process is complete but customerType is User not a Contact.
